Environmental Protection.summary: Kennedy has consistently opposed environmental regulations he views as harmful to Louisiana's oil and gas industry.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
EPA methane emissions rule support (Congressional Review Act vote, 2023)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Kennedy supported the First Step Act but has generally taken tough-on-crime positions on other criminal justice issues.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Kennedy has consistently opposed tax increases on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)
voted_against: Build Back Better Act with tax increases on high earners (procedural votes, 2021-2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Kennedy has consistently opposed abortion rights and supported restrictive abortion legislation.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, January 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Kennedy has opposed federal LGBTQ+ non-discrimination protections and same-sex marriage legislation.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Cassidy has supported some bipartisan environmental initiatives while opposing broad climate regulations.
voted_for: Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with environmental provisions (Senate vote, August 2021)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Cassidy supported the First Step Act and has backed some bipartisan criminal justice reforms.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Cassidy has opposed progressive tax increases and supported tax cuts.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Cassidy has consistently voted against abortion rights legislation.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Cassidy supported the Respect for Marriage Act but has opposed other LGBTQ+ legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Fields has historically supported environmental protection measures during his previous congressional service.

Police Accountability.summary: Fields has supported police accountability measures as part of the Congressional Black Caucus priorities.

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Fields has been a consistent advocate for criminal justice reform throughout his political career.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Fields has supported reproductive health rights in his public statements.

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Carter has consistently supported criminal justice reform legislation.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Carter has supported progressive tax policies and Build Back Better provisions.
voted_for: Build Back Better Act (House vote, November 2021)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act opposition (not in Congress at time)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Carter has consistently voted for reproductive health rights legislation.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Carter has supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality.

Public School Funding.summary: Carter has advocated for increased public school funding in congressional appropriations.

Small Business Funding.summary: Letlow has advocated for small business support and rural business development.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Letlow has opposed abortion rights legislation and supported pro-life measures.

Public School Funding.summary: Letlow has supported education funding particularly for rural schools.
